title: IDFC First Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IDFC First Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IDFC First Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IDFC First Bank:
IDFC First Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank!
